title: Amazons of Rome
director: Carlo Ludovico Bragaglia, Vittorio Cottafavi, Peter O'Cord
writer: Luigi Emmanuele, Léo Joannon, Gaetano Loffredo
actors: Louis Jourdan, Sylvia Syms, Jean Chevrier
plot: A warrior chieftain dashes between his barbaric allies and a beleaguered city that's being defended by embattled women warriors.
